A '''gablith masquer''' was a creature [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineered]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to function as a living disguise, allowing an individual to pose as [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] or [[Givin/Legends|Givins]].

==Description==
Gablith masquers were [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineered]] creatures employed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] as organic disguises, similar to [[ooglith cloaker]]s. They allowed an individual to disguise themselves as a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]]<ref name="BP" /> or [[Givin/Legends|Givin]],<ref name="EoVII">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''</ref> rather than a [[Human/Legends|Human]].<ref name="BP" />

==History==
During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the gablith masquer allowed Yuuzhan Vong [[Agent/Legends|agents]] to disguise themselves as Duros. [[Nom Anor]] used a gablith masquer to pose as Dassid Cree'Ar, a Duros researcher in [[Settlement 32]] on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]].<ref name="BP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
